reviews.comment:
Mala atencion la chica del full el 29 de marzo a las 23.45 aprox. dijo que se apuren que estaba cerrando, una maleducada, el playero me robo los puntos de la carga de nafta, cargue infinia llene tanque y me dijo que efectivo no cargan los puntos, obviamente se los cargo para el o algun amigo de el. Me habian cargado antes los puntos y habia pagado efectivo. MALISIMO! ojala los rajen a los 2

(Translated by Google)
Bad service. The girl at the full service station on March 29th at approximately 11:45 PM. She said to hurry up because she was closing. She was rude. The beach attendant stole my points from my gas fill-up. I filled up with Infinia, filled the tank, and he told me they don't charge points in cash. Obviously, he charged them for himself or a friend of his. They had charged my points before, and I had paid cash. AWFUL! I hope they fire them both.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNJMUl2OVZREAE

reviews.comment:
Lunes 24 de marzo 19 hs malísima la atención de las chicas del shopping, nada de empatía, heladeras exhibidoras vacías. Fui muy mal atendida

(Translated by Google)
Monday, March 24, 7 p.m. The service from the shopping center staff was terrible. They showed no empathy and the display cabinets were empty. I was treated very poorly.
